sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Box, Paper, Typography, Grid, TextField, Button, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Chip, Card, CardContent, Alert, LinearProgress, Select, MenuItem, FormControl, InputLabel, } from '@mui/material'; import { Search, Download, Print, ShoppingCart, Refresh, PictureAsPdf, } from '@mui/icons-material'; import { toast } from 'react-toastify'; import { reportService } from '../../services/reportService'; const PurchaseDetailsReport = () => { const [filters, setFilters] = useState({ startDate: new Date(new Date().setDate(1)).toISOString().split('T')[0], endDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], dateType: 'INVOICE_DATE', supplierId: '', itemId: '', }); const [data, setData] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const [summary, setSummary] = useState(null); const fetchReport = async () => { if (!filters.startDate || !filters.endDate) { setError('Please select both start and end dates'); return; } setLoading(true); setError(''); try { const response = await reportService.getPurchaseDetailsReport(filters); setData(response.content || []); setSummary(response.summary || null); toast.success('Report loaded successfully'); } catch (error) { setError('Failed to load report'); toast.error('Failed to load report'); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; return ( Purchase Details Report View detailed purchase data with item-wise breakdown {error && ( setError('')}> {error} )} setFilters({ ...filters, startDate: e.target.value })} InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }} /> setFilters({ ...filters, endDate: e.target.value })} InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }} /> Date Type setFilters({ ...filters, supplierId: e.target.value })} placeholder="Optional" /> setFilters({ ...filters, itemId: e.target.value })} placeholder="Optional" /> {summary && ( Total Purchases ₹{summary.totalPurchases?.toFixed(2)} Total Items Purchased {summary.totalItems} Unique Products {summary.uniqueProducts} )} {loading ? ( ) : data.length > 0 ? ( Invoice No Date Supplier Item Code Qty Rate Total {data.map((row, index) => ( {row.invoiceNo} {row.invoiceDate} {row.supplierName} {row.itemName} {row.itemCode} {row.quantity} ₹{row.unitPrice?.toFixed(2)} ₹{row.totalAmount?.toFixed(2)} ))}
) : ( No purchase details found for the selected filters )} ); }; export default PurchaseDetailsReport;
